title: Searchable Packs
description: Adds a search bar to quickly filter resource packs.
body:
Searchable Packs

Find your favorite resource packs faster than ever with this sleek search bar added directly to the resource pack screen.

Features

  • Integrated search bar in the resource pack menu
  • Instant live filtering of resource packs by name
  • Clear visual feedback: green highlight for matching packs, red for non-matching
  • Lightweight, seamless, and easy to use

Installation

Simply place the mod into your mods folder and launch the client.

Why Use Searchable Packs?

If you have dozens of resource packs installed, scrolling can be tedious. This mod helps you quickly narrow down your options with a simple, intuitive search box — saving time and hassle.

Support & Contact

For questions or feedback, find me on Modrinth, GitHub, or Discord: jakomi123.
